options.a: Referred to as "Typhoon," it has the highest frequency, averaging 20 occurrences per year, primarily from June to November.
options.b: Referred to as "Cyclone," it occurs approximately 12 times per year, predominantly from April to May and October to November.
options.c: Called "Cyclone" (also known as "Willy-Willy" in Australia). It occurs infrequently, primarily from December to April.
options.d: Referred to as "Cyclone," it occurs intermittently, mainly from December to April.
